nya (Virgo) and
Meena (Pisces) Lagnas. A malefic in the 5th and 9th is not
generally conducive to do good. The ascendant, the sign occu
pied by the Moon, the sign having the lord of the sign occupied
by the Moon are all to be examined in determining which can
be the Lagna for a given chart.
Next we should note the fateful degrees in various signs. lf
the Moon is found in these, there is a disaster if the house
happens to be a Kendra or the 8th house in particular. These
fateful degrees are, beginning with Aries, 26, 12, 13, 25, 24,
11, 26, 14, 13, 25, 5and 12 respectively. Equally dangerous or
malefic are the degrees 8, 9, 22, 22, 25, 14, 4, 23, 18, 20, 21 and
10 for the signs in order beginning with Aries.
Let us also add the parts of the body governed by the
signs. Aries and Libra refer to the brain, head, and muscles.
Taurus and Scorpio speak about the throat, bronchial tubes,
neck, shoulders, mucous membranes, and glands. Gemini and
